issue_summary: Add FileBackedOutputStream.asByteSource(), a ByteSource-returning method to replace getSupplier(). Created by MOE: http://code.google.com/p/moe-java MOE_MIGRATED_REVID=47293826
javadoc_before:
/**
   * Returns a supplier that may be used to retrieve the data buffered
   * by this stream.
   */
javadoc_after:
/**
   * Returns a supplier that may be used to retrieve the data buffered
   * by this stream. This method returns the same object as
   * {@link #asByteSource()}.
   *
   * @deprecated Use {@link #asByteSource()} instead. This method is scheduled
   *     to be removed in Guava 16.0.
   */
